MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-12-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT HEIDI SAVE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
